meta.title: Bangalore Courier & International Shipping | Eagle Logistics
meta.description: Bangalore courier for domestic and international parcels to the USA, UK, EU and Middle East. Doorstep pickup, tracked delivery with DHL, FedEx and UPS.
meta.imageAlt: International courier and cargo from Eagle Logistics Bangalore

hero.headline: Ship from Bangalore to the world
hero.subheadline: Affordable domestic and international courier with doorstep pickup and end-to-end tracking.

intro.title: Eagle Logistics & Express Services
intro.body: Established in 2010, Eagle Logistics offers competitive rates for international parcels from India to the USA, UK, European Union, Middle East and Far East. Arrange doorstep collection or drop off at a local pickup point — then track your shipment through our reliable partner network. We specialise in local, national and international courier with careful handling and international door-to-door cargo.

mission.title: Our Mission
items: Be the link between you and your loved ones abroad
Track and record every customer shipment
Serve you with dedicated, passionate staff
Give you full transparency throughout delivery
Deliver the best possible customer service experience

serviceCards.title: Domestic
serviceCards.body: Time-sensitive documents and parcels delivered next day to metros, major cities and towns on a priority basis.

serviceCards.title: International
serviceCards.body: Documents and non-documents delivered worldwide at economical rates, with modes chosen for speed and reliability.

items.text: Track your parcel from collection to delivery
Get quotes in seconds for international shipping
Add protection cover to the parcel if required
Easy customs documents built into the booking process
Home or work collection — or drop off locally

items.quote: My family and I are very impressed with the service from Eagle Logistics. Smooth booking and clear updates.
items.name: John Marcus

items.quote: Doorstep pickup from Malleshwaram was easy and the parcel reached on time. Highly recommend.
items.name: Nidhi

items.quote: I sent a parcel to my husband in Nevada, USA — it arrived within three days. Thank you, Eagle.
items.name: Sharda

items.title: Air Cargo
items.summary: Fast air logistics with economical pricing and multimodal reach across India.

items.title: Sea Cargo
items.summary: Reliable FCL and LCL sea freight with worldwide shipping networks.

items.title: Surface Cargo
items.summary: Careful road transport with reliable, on-time domestic surface delivery.

cta.title: Ready to ship with Eagle?
cta.subtitle: Get a sample rate online, or message us on WhatsApp for an exact quote.
